MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Aug-28-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Thomas E. Drohan, Esq. of Legal Assistance to the Elderly, Inc., Tel. 415.538.3333, for defendant and moving party;
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. of the Law Office of Elizabeth MacDonald, Tel. 415.922.5939, specially appearing for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JOANNA CORONELL'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is denied. The proof of service of Billy Pena adequately demonstrates substitute service. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
